pre_game.message: Hey, I’m G. It’s getting pretty real in here now that we’re all together—how are you holding up with the wait?
Hey G, I’m I. I’m doing okay, just eager to get started and see how this all plays out. How are you feeling about the game?
I’m feeling pretty pumped, honestly. I’ve always loved a good challenge and I’m really determined to walk away with a win for my family.
I hear you—having people counting on you definitely adds some extra drive, and I’m hoping to do the same for the people I care about.
Exactly, it definitely raises the stakes. Have you heard any rumors about what we're actually going to be doing yet?
Not a word, it’s all been kept pretty quiet so far. I’m just trying to stay ready for anything.
That’s the best way to be. I’m just itching to get started—the anticipation is the hardest part!
For sure. Every minute we wait is another minute I'm overthinking it. Hopefully, they don't keep us hanging much longer.
Tell me about it! I’m just trying to stay focused on the goal so I don’t drive myself crazy. Have you played games like this before?
No, this is a first for me. I usually play it safe, but the opportunity was too big to ignore. It was good talking to you, G—let's hope we both make our families proud.
Totally, sometimes you just have to take that leap. It was great talking, I—let's go get that win for our families!
